display.purpose: Page-level section titles, major orientation headings. Used sparingly — at most once per route.

headline.purpose: Card titles, dialog headings, subsection labels that anchor a content block.

title.purpose: Inline section labels, column group headers, named items in detail views.

body.purpose: All prose content, table cells, form values, descriptions. The dominant text size throughout the app.

label.purpose: UI chrome: table column headers, meta information, status chips, form field labels. Never uppercase.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popover menus, command palettes, dialogs. Always two-layer.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: Card hover states, subtle inline surface differentiation.

shadows.name: definition
shadows.purpose: shadow-xs equivalent. Minimal definition for bordered inputs and outline buttons.

motion.name: ease-out-fast
motion.purpose: State transitions on interactive elements: button hover, input focus, nav item active. 150ms default.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and small state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main progressive action on a surface. Only one per content area.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.852 0.199 91.936); color: oklch(0.421 0.095 57.708); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.36rem; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.852 0.199 91.936 / 80%); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9 / 50%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary or cancel action. Clearly defined without competing with primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.36rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.93 0.007 106.5); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 4%); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.966 0.005 106.5); color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9 / 50%); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary inline actions, icon-only buttons, table row actions. Invisible at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0.36rem; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.966 0.005 106.5); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9 / 50%); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Transparent background, border-only at rest.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 2.25rem; width: 100%; min-width: 0; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.93 0.007 106.5); border-radius: 0.36rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 4%); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.58 0.031 107.3); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.737 0.021 106.9 / 50%); } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 20%); } .ds-input:disabled { pointer-events: none; cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Badge (Default)
components.description: Harvest Amber status pill. Active states, primary labels.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.852 0.199 91.936); color: oklch(0.421 0.095 57.708); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 1.17rem; border: 1px solid transparent; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Badge (Outline)
components.description: Neutral outline pill. Secondary statuses, archived states, unset labels.
components.css: .ds-badge-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 1.17rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.93 0.007 106.5); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Flat surface with ring definition. No hover shadow by default.
components.html:
Projects This Month
4 active projects
Content area
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); border-radius: 0.63rem; padding: 0; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); outline: 1px solid oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1 / 10%); outline-offset: -1px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 4%); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 1.5rem 1.5rem 0; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); } .ds-card-description { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.58 0.031 107.3); line-height: 1.5; } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 1.5rem 1.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Left sidebar navigation item. Three states: default, hover, active.
components.html: DashboardProjectsClients
components.css: .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.125rem; padding: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.988 0.003 106.5); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.625rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border-radius: 0.36rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.58 0.031 107.3); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.966 0.005 106.5); color: oklch(0.228 0.013 107.4); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.966 0.005 106.5); color: oklch(0.228 0.013 107.4); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Zero-data placeholder. Dashed container, centered content, single CTA.
components.html:
No projects yet

Create your first project to start tracking time.
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; width: 100%; padding: 3rem; text-align: center; border: 1px dashed oklch(0.93 0.007 106.5); border-radius: 0.45rem; font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); } .ds-empty-icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; background: oklch(0.966 0.005 106.5); border-radius: 0.45rem; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-empty-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.153 0.006 107.1); } .ds-empty-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.58 0.031 107.3); max-width: 36ch; margin: 0 auto; }

narrative.overview:
Bee Time's visual language borrows from the honest materiality of a well-worn notebook: warm paper, precise ruled lines, a single pen that leaves amber traces. Nothing decorates for decoration's sake. Every element has a function and earns its place exactly the way a well-organized spread of notes does — structured, immediate, with warmth that comes from use rather than ornament.

The system is built for intermittent, focused use. A freelancer opening it mid-project doesn't want to be welcomed or guided. They want to find what they need, do it, and close the tab. Density is kept low; spacing breathes. Hierarchy is unambiguous. The amber accent marks where action lives, and then gets out of the way.

This system explicitly rejects enterprise SaaS patterns, legacy invoicing tool aesthetics, Bootstrap admin defaults, and gradient-heavy startup SaaS.
keyCharacteristics: One accent color (Harvest Amber) used sparingly — its restraint makes it meaningful
Warm neutrals throughout, no pure black or pure white
Flat surfaces at rest; borders and rings carry definition, not shadows
Very small border radius (0.45rem base): precise, not rounded-for-softness
Full dark mode with identical semantic roles, not a color inversion

rules.name: The Single Warmth Rule
rules.body: Harvest Amber is used on at most 10% of any surface. It appears on primary action targets only. Its rarity is the signal. Introducing a second accent color is prohibited.

rules.name: The No Cold Neutral Rule
rules.body: All neutrals carry hue 107 (warm gray-olive). Never use pure gray, blue-gray, or cool-shifted neutrals. When adding new neutral steps, stay within hue 104–110.

rules.name: The Weight-Carries Rule
rules.body: One font family, no exceptions. Hierarchy lives in font weight and size contrast (minimum 1.25x ratio between adjacent steps). Font family variation is not a tool in this system.

rules.name: The Body Is 14px Rule
rules.body: Default UI text is text-sm (0.875rem). Do not use text-base (1rem) as the body size in data tables or form fields.

rules.name: The Rest Is Flat Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest has no shadow. If you're adding box-shadow to a card, table, or list item in its default state, remove it and use a ring or background tint instead.

rules.name: The Two-Layer Float Rule
rules.body: Floating surfaces always use a two-layer shadow: an ambient spread at low opacity + a tight definition shadow. Single-layer shadows read as accidental.

dos: Do use Harvest Amber only on the single primary action on a given surface.
Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 for card boundaries consistently across light and dark mode.
Do use weight contrast of at least 1.25x between adjacent type hierarchy levels.
Do use tonal background shifts to create depth without shadows.
Do use OKLCH for all color values.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for all transitions.
Do ensure all text on Harvest Amber backgrounds uses Amber Foreground (oklch(0.421 0.095 57.708)).
donts: Don't add a second accent color. There is no blue, green, purple, or teal in this system.
Don't use enterprise SaaS patterns: nested dropdowns, dense form grids, always-visible bulk-action toolbars.
Don't replicate legacy invoicing tool aesthetics: full-width table borders, no visual hierarchy.
Don't use Bootstrap admin template defaults: blue primary color, gray sidebar, identical padding everywhere.
Don't build hero-metric layouts: large number, small label below, gradient accent card.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient fills on text (background-clip: text).
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur) as decoration.
Don't use pure black or pure white — all neutrals carry hue 107.
Don't place a card inside a card.
